items.source_title: Temporary Cloudflare accounts for AI agents
items.headline: Ephemeral credentials are the right auth primitive for agents
items.body: Cloudflare now issues temporary accounts scoped to individual AI agent sessions — credentials that expire when the session ends. The current ADO MCP Server relies on long-lived Azure DevOps PATs, which is the obvious weak point in that design. Short-lived, session-scoped credentials would make the server safer to hand to other people without needing to rotate keys after each use.
